decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Mission 2 (Containment Zone J) complete. Region secured but all 3 pilots KIA. Grid power critical at 1/7. Got Reactor Core from time pod. Solver fix deployed mid-mission: enemy units now correctly hard-block movement (was allowing pathing through enemies). Next: island map with 3 remaining missions on Detritus Disposal.
